1.speaker: Crab
1.text: I have been thinking about what you said.

2.speaker: Crab
2.text: About time. And what it means to use it.

3.speaker: Crab
3.text: My kind has been here a very long time.

4.speaker: Crab
4.text: The dinosaurs had so little time.

5.speaker: Crab
5.text: But they filled it with something.

6.speaker: Crab
6.text: I wonder what I have filled mine with.

7.speaker: Crab
7.text: I am not sure I know the answer.

8.speaker: Crab
8.text: But I think that is the right question to ask.
